name: goal-setter
description: Shape rough requests into compact, outcome-first /goal completion contracts before long autonomous runs.

interface.shortDescription: Outcome-first goal contracts for long autonomous runs
interface.longDescription: Turns a rough request into a compact /goal completion contract: intended-outcome image first, bounded evidence gathering, decision rules instead of process-heavy recipes, anti-gaming constraints, evidence-audited progress rules, independent verification, and a readiness check before activation or handoff. Works with Codex goal tools and Claude Code /goal.
defaultPrompt: Set a goal: shape this request into a completion contract.
Draft a goal contract for this task without activating it.
Shape this splittable work into a goal that structures the independent pieces for parallel execution.
